rulings.Case Title: MARTIN ENG VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Per Ccp 391.1 Et, Seq
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Per Ccp 391.1 Et, Seq Grant. 1) Plaintiff vexatious litigant. 2) Failed to show how will prevail on merits. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVENECEL VILLANUEVA et al VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, Na'S Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2012, line 2. Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank's Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint grant no opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVENECEL VILLANUEVA et al VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, Na'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2012, line 2. Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, Na'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to causes of action 2, 3, & 4. Sustained without leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY A FENBERG VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al

rulings.Case Title: NAY D. PATEL DBA EUROPA HOTEL & K. MIRANDA VS. JAMES STARKS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT JAMES STARK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENIO MARTINEZ ROCHA VS. EUGENIO LLAMAS MARTINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 3, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT ALMA LLAMAS, EUGENIO LLAMAS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS grant. Subject to opposition. (501/REQ)
